title: Chest Search
body:
# PLEASE USE SOMETHING LIKE [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) INSTEAD
I don't have the time to develop mods anymore and I lost interest years ago when all my friends moved on from this game and therefore I lost my motivation to make mods for them. Sorry.

Adds a search bar to chests so you can see where an item is more easily (see gallery?). Only requires fabric loader, fabric api is not necessary.

So originally this was made because I thought that Roughly Enough Items didn't have such a feature for this like Just Enough Items did, but as it turns out I just forgot you had to double-click for that. So if you already have REI you don't need this.

Well, the remaining use case is people like me who don't want the entire REI gui on their screen and just a search. Also might be useful if you don't want to install Fabric API for whatever reason.
